description_long: This is a dark green and white Ford Crown Victoria-style police car with a prominent roof-mounted light bar featuring red, blue, and white lights. The vehicle has 'SHERIFF' written in large gold letters on both front doors, accompanied by a gold star badge emblem. The car's body is mostly dark green, with a white roof and upper door panels, and the number '911' is marked in yellow on the rear quarter panels. The front features a black push bumper, and the windows are tinted dark. The wheels are black, and the car has visible side mirrors, antennas, and a rear license plate. The overall appearance is robust, official, and clearly marked for law enforcement use.
description: A dark green and white sheriff police car with a roof light bar, gold 'SHERIFF' markings, and a black push bumper. It features official insignia, antennas, and emergency lights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black push bumper, dark green hood, tinted windshield, and the red-blue-white roof light bar.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the large gold 'SHERIFF' text, gold star badge, white roof, and '911' marking on the rear quarter panel.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the white roof, rear windshield, roof light bar, and visible license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with 'SHERIFF' text, gold star badge, and '911' marking, plus visible antennas.
attribute_police_markings: Large gold 'SHERIFF' text on both front doors, gold star badge next to the text, and yellow '911' on the rear quarter panels. The markings are bold, uppercase, and highly visible.
attribute_emergency_lights: Roof-mounted light bar with red, blue, and white segments, rectangular in shape and centrally placed. No visible grille or rear deck lights.
attribute_police_insignia: Gold star badge emblem next to 'SHERIFF' text on both front doors.
attribute_license_plate: Visible on the rear, white with dark text, but specific text and codes are not legible.
